title: Resolution authorizing the Honorable Municipal Mayor Caesar P. Perez to enter and sign into an agreement/deed of sale in behalf of the Municipal Government of the Los Baños for the acquisition of three parcels of land covering a total area of Five Thousand Four Hundred and Eighty-Four square meters (5,484 sq.m.) located at Barangay Anos, Los Baños, Laguna for proposed Municipal Public Cemetery.
